TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Alexander De Croo ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 11, Alexander De Croo, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1975) mrhuw Belgium ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander De Croo, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Alexander De Croo minkahul sa Vilvoorde, Flemish Brabant na Belgium. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1975 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' == canpyuta hknyun ==
S.PHON: alexan*er *e ¶~ ®roo rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, alexan*er *e ¶~ ®roo, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤el…£ium ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a alexan*er *e ¶~ ®roo, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral alexan*er *e ¶~ ®roo minkańßul s~…ēa *il*oor*e, *lemis~…ēńß ő≤raő≤ant na ő≤el…£ium. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē == ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun ==
S.FORM: Alexander De Croo ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 11, Alexander De Croo, squliq na sezi'. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤el…£ium ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a alexan*er *e ¶~ ®roo, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral alexan*er *e ¶~ ®roo minkańßul s~…ēa *il*oor*e, *lemis~…ēńß ő≤raő≤ant na ő≤el…£ium. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē == ¶~ ®anpjuta ńßknjun ==
